articles.title: Energy & Utilities Roundup: Market Talk
articles.summary: Find insight on oil inventories, Canadian energy stocks, oil futures, Repsol and more in the latest Market Talks covering energy and utilities.

articles.title: Spanish Stocks Drop After Trump Says He Wants to End Trade With Spain
articles.summary: Spain's IBEX 35 fell sharply after President Donald Trump said he believed the U.S.-Iran ceasefire was over, and that he wants no more trade with the country. "We don't want to do any trade business with Spain anymore," Trump told a press conference in Ankara, Turkey. Madrid-listed banks slid sharply, with Banco Santander and BBVA losing 4.2% and 2.9%, respectively.

articles.title: Chevron Confirms Safe Venezuela Operations After Major Earthquakes
articles.summary: CVX confirms its Venezuelan operations remain safe and fully operational after devastating earthquakes, while supporting employees and local communities.

articles.title: Repsol Expands Venezuela Footprint With New Oil & Gas Deals
articles.summary: REPYY deepens its Venezuela presence through new oil and gas agreements, targeting production growth and long-term energy opportunities.

articles.title: PDVSA and Repsol sign deal to boost oil and gas output in Venezuela
articles.summary: The agreement centres on increasing production at the Petroquiriquire JV on the eastern side of Lake Maracaibo.

articles.title: MOL Group, Repsol, TPAO sign agreement for Libyan offshore exploration
articles.summary: Planned work on Block O7 includes the collection of 1,500km of 2D seismic data, 2,300km² of 3D seismic data and one exploration well.

articles.title: Repsol Sells 49.99% Stake in Renewable Asset Portfolio in Spain
articles.summary: REPYY sells a 49.99% stake in a 705 MW Spanish renewables portfolio to Masdar for about 150M, advancing its asset rotation strategy.

articles.title: Repsol and Masdar to partner in €849 million renewables portfolio in Spain
articles.summary: Repsol and Masdar have signed an agreement for Masdar to acquire a 49.99% stake in a renewable energy portfolio in Spain.

articles.title: Masdar to buy stake in Repsol’s Spanish renewables assets
articles.summary: The portfolio comprises 13 wind farms with a combined capacity of 402MW and six solar parks totalling 303MW, for an overall capacity of 705MW.

articles.title: European Indexes Follow U.S., Asian Peers Higher After Trump Cancels Iran Strikes
articles.summary: European stock indexes opened higher, following U.S. and Asian markets, after President Donald Trump canceled planned attacks on Iran on Thursday and said the final points of a peace plan had been approved by all parties.
